history.content:
Hey there! 👋 This is Bookly support following up on your order BK-1003. I know you received the wrong books — Spanish-language titles instead of your computer science textbooks. So sorry about that mix-up!

Great news though — a specialist reviewed your case and since you've been a loyal Gold member with us, here's what we can do: we'll ship out the correct books (Introduction to Algorithms and The Art of Computer Programming) right away with free expedited shipping, no need to wait for the wrong ones to come back first. Plus, we'd like to offer you 15% off as an apology for the hassle.

Would you like us to go ahead with that, or would you prefer a different resolution? Totally up to you!

task.reason: Wrong items received — customer ordered two computer science books (Introduction to Algorithms + The Art of Computer Programming) but received two unrelated Spanish-language books (El Hombre en Busca de Sentido, Lazos de Amor).
task.summary: Customer received completely wrong books for order BK-1003 ($389.95) — got two Spanish-language titles instead of two computer science textbooks. No explicit urgency signals. Customer is a 5-year Gold loyalty member with $1,240 annual spend. Photo of incorrect items provided.
task.procedure: Given his loyalty status, offer an immediate replacement with 15% off, without waiting to receive the wrong items first. Include expedited shipping at no cost so the customer receives the correct books before their class. If the customer prefers a regular return instead, proceed without any pushback.

memory.summary: Customer received wrong books for order BK-1003 (expected Introduction to Algorithms and The Art of Computer Programming, received El Hombre en Busca de Sentido and Lazos de Amor). Return initiated (RT-101), flagged for human review due to order over $300. Photo of wrong items saved. Customer is a Gold loyalty member, 4-year customer with ~$2,100 annual spend.
